review_text: Great spot, simple and fun holiday for the kids. Cabin was fun and kids loved the activities.
Wonderful site. Great location. Reception staff was wonderful.  The park was fairly empty so she put us in a lovely spot by the river access. Amenities very clean and in good repair.

We stayed on Friday 1/05 to Sun 2/05 and found   this park amazing. The staff were so friendly and helpful - Jen and Rachel in particular! 😀There is so much space, the sites are big. If you love nature, animals in the wild, this is the place to come! 😀
Chittima and I are from Naturally Wondering YouTube. Check it out - we made x2 Shorts fom our stay in park 25K people have viewed the first one in the last 3 days. A long form video will be out in a few days...
It is the perfect park to base yourself to explore the Great Ocean Road...
Fully catered for your family excellent experience

2 stars only because of the location is next to the beach.

We paid for a “Premium Grass Site,” but what we got was dirt and sand, very uneven to the point where we couldn’t properly level our caravan. It was nowhere near what you’d expect from a premium site.

There’s no proper sewer connection, and it’s unpleasant seeing people leaving their pipes on the ground. For a park of this size, having only one dumping point makes no sense, you actually have to drive just to empty your cassette.

At night, the park is poorly lit. Our area was completely dark, which feels like a safety concern. On top of that, the public footpath runs right alongside the park with no gates or barriers, so anyone can easily walk straight through the sites.

The no-fire rule all year round is also frustrating. We visited in autumn, it was cold and rainy and not being allowed to have any kind of fire just didn’t make sense.

Lastly, despite the park being nearly empty, we asked for a late checkout and were told we had to pay extra to stay until 4 pm. We only needed a couple more hours and ended up getting just one hour extra. It felt unnecessarily inflexible.

Also worth mentioning the swimming pool is very small and tiny, so don’t be misled by the photos.

Overall, disappointing experience. I wouldn’t recommend this park.

Bathroom has mold and isn't clean. Staff isn't friendly on helping for where we could do things, place look more like an area for people to retire at or stop for a resting point for temporary time. And everything closes at 5pm like EVERYTHING
What a great spot .beautiful park clean amenities and close to everything.|Great little seaside town.
perfect

Enjoyed the closeness to the beach and shops like everything is walking distance. Picture perfect! Sites are decent sizes, lots of trees and wildlife, I mean Kangaroos lying next to our tents. Staff were lovely. Will recommend to friends.
A really good caravan and camping park a great location lots of wiid life (kangaroos) birds etc with a fantastic family  friendly beach worth a visit

Well run large Caravan Park ,
4 nights on a dog friendly powered site,
Good size site , lots of clean amenities
Dog friendly sites are down the back near the river and could do with some tidying up ,
Good walking tracks everywhere,
Close to shops 🤟
Loving it, so quiet and relaxing.
Great spot ,family friendly, easy access to river shops and beach and good facilities.
Ideal spot for a few days to relax close to beach great bowls club and local pub in walking distance. Jam packed on Christmas holidays heaps to keep the kids entertained.

We stayed in a cabin and it was amazing. Everything was set up nicely with heating and cooling.
The kitchen had cooking utensils but everything else (cooking oil etc) we had to take with us.

Extra special thanks to Chris for getting us in for one night when it was fully booked out so we could stay somewhere on the way home A+ service wow thanks so much.

The Anglesea Family Caravan Park remains one of the most popular stays on the Great Ocean Road for a reason: it’s hard to beat for location and family-friendly atmosphere. Based on recent 2025 and early 2026 guest experiences, here is a detailed review.
The Vibe: Relaxed Coastal Charm
The park feels like a classic Australian seaside getaway. It’s expansive (roughly 16 hectares) but well-organized, with a mix of modern cabins and powered sites shaded by native trees. One of the biggest highlights for many guests is the local wildlife—don't be surprised to see kangaroos grazing near your tent or cabin in the early morning.
What We Love
• Location, Location, Location: It’s the only park in Anglesea with both river and beach frontage. You can walk to the main surf beach in about 3–5 minutes or stroll into the town center for coffee and shops in under 10 minutes.
• The "Kid Magnet" Facilities: The park is built for families. The giant jumping pillow, mini-golf, and multiple playgrounds keep kids busy for hours.
• Sustainability: It’s great to know that a portion of your booking fee goes directly back into maintaining the Great Ocean Road coastline.
Staff were super friendly and accommodating, we rang last minute and staff were able to find us a powered site for the night. Perfect location and very clean amenities. Very well kept and ran park

An amazing campsite with a fantastic area for children, direct access to the ocean, and cosy campervan sites as well as cabins. The presence of ducks, kangaroos, and parrots throughout the grounds creates a truly natural and immersive atmosphere.

I've travelled Australia and NEVER had an experience where Toilet blocks were CLOSED for cleaning btw 8am - 10am. How bloody ridiculous! Not to mention that they are few are far between plus Camp kitchen runs out of hot water. It's 2026 upgrade services!

Stayed in a small cabin, very good location across from shops and restaurant at bowling club is close, rooms were ok bit old but very clean and comfy bed, staff were good check in easy and they were very helpful, would definitely stay again
Beautiful caravan park but amenities need to be cleaned more regularly at peak times such as Easter.

I didnt use any rooms, i had my pitch for my roof top tent it was good and near the entrance to the beach compared to all the other caravam parks i have used this is maybe the most basic i feel for the price it was too high.
Lovely caravan park with everything you need. I visited a friend staying there and was very impressed. Beautiful location!

Wir waren 1 Nacht mit einem kleinen Campervan auf diesem Platz.
Ausser der Lage können wir nichts Positives an diesem Platz finden und waren vorher schon 4 Wochen unterwegs.
In der Küche waren alle Küchenutensilien von den Besitzern entfernt, unter der Angabe dass zuviel gestohlen wurde. Bei diesem Preis (mehr als irgendwo, wo wir vorher waren) absolut unverständlich. Bei den Duschen kam teilweise nur kaltes Wasser bzw ein Rinnsal. Zudem liess sich einmal nachts die Türe des WCs nicht mehr öffnen. Nur mit sehr viel Glück gelang es, aus der Kabine zu kommen. Wifi war inexistent.
Insgesamt stimmt das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis überhaupt nicht. Können diesen Platz nicht empfehlen.

Great b7sh setting in some areas.the amount of wildlife is amazing. Mobs of roos, variety of birds and other natives.
Friendly staff and accesible bathroom avail for campers!. The pool is dolar heating so dont dip in during winter.
Great walking paths along river very short walk to beach and clifftop walks nearby.

Great cabins and amenities and close
to the town. Easy check in and lovely staff in the office

We stayed at a powered campsite for four nights. The site was beautifully shaded with trees. The location is superb, next to the beach and river. Please be careful, the beach is not patrolled.
The only downside is there was no pots, pans or utensils in the kitchen area. So come prepared. It was busy due to long weekend, but the park was well spread and enough facilities available for everyone to enjoy.

Stayed here in a dog friendly cabin for 4 days. Really great experience - the cabin had everything we needed and was a lot more modern than we were expecting. Very quiet, safe, family friendly place. Walking distance to the shops and beach. Can't fault it, would absolutely stay here again!

Note: Wifi does not work here, and reception is limited.
营地非常棒
Picturesque bush settings on the beach with kangaroos
We stayed in a cabin and it was perfect for my family. The caravan park had great amenities for the whole family and the location made it a great place to spend some time.

The anglsea Caravan park is a must visit if organised by any camping groups, as I am a student from rmit, there was a camping hosted by them. The experience was so good with the beach attached to the camping site and also has a community kitchen where everyone can access it. We can see kangaroos roaming around the site. And its very enlighting to watch them and there is bird sighting as well. If you are planning for great ocean road. This is the best place to rest over/ can also be planned for a one day trip just for chilling. I would recommend to go in summers as in winter the camping equipments are needed, like tents, sleeping bags, sleeping mattress,hot packs etc. as it gets really cold during nights where temperature might drop upto 2°C. And the cold is very different than the cold we experience in the city as there is sea  nearby. The breeze is more. Overall a must try experience.  Also the restaurants close by 8pm max. So carry ur food or buy food before 8pm. There is also a BWS just 1 km away from the site.
Cabin very convenient great location
Great family caravan park
Really clean facilities with lots of play equipment for kids and close to walking tracks, the beach and the shops.

Their "Prime" spots are not worth the extra expense. No grass, just mud with overhanging branches that will damage your van if not careful. Very small sites with narrow roads. Also, the main path into the town has locked gates, so you have to go double the distance needed. Amenities widely spaced, dirty, lights not working and run down. We won't be back again.

We camped in a "premium" powered tent site located at the farthest back left of the park, near beach access. Our closest bathroom amenities block and kitchen was a short walk back towards the park entrance. After the first night, a large school group took over the end of the park where we were camping and park administration posted signs that our closest bathroom amenities and kitchen were exclusively for school group use only. The next closest bathroom amenities were a considerable distance further to walk and took some time. No warning or notice had been given of the school group booking. A massive and unacceptable inconvenience that could have been avoided with proper communication on or before our arrival.
By far, our worst experience on a journey lasting just over 3 weeks along The Great Ocean Road into South Australia, Mt Gambier, Naracoorte, Adelaide hills, Robe and back along the Great Ocean Road, returning to Melbourne.
We won't be going back to this park.
There was a big empty out here
The most friendly staff and accommodating.
Room was clean, took a while for the cabin to warm up. Bed was super comfortable.

I'm not sure if it is due to the time of year, but duck poo everywhere.
Close to shops and beach.
The large site we had was very good (21' van and car fit easy).
Great location and facilities!

We had a wonderful experience—the staff were incredibly friendly, and the location was absolutely perfect. We woke up surrounded by kangaroos and spent the morning at the front beach, which is beautiful too. Truly unforgettable! :)

Super friendly staff, lovely location beside the beach and the setting is super cozy. Camping under the trees, kept us somewhat sheltered during the rain. Toilets/showers/laundry facilities were perfect. Didn't use the pool/kitchen etc, but from what we saw, they looked pretty good too!
We booked last minute, and very happy that we did. Nice cosy camp grounds under the trees for smaller vehicles. Reasonable price. Clean facilities. Very family friendly.
Large space for caravans and tents close to ocean, shops, cafes and hotel.  Lots of cabins to stay in.  Oh, and a wonderful pool with rock waterfall!

Firstly the rooms were ok everything was nice but a few things. On the walls there was brown liquids everywhere,I found brown liquids in my bed sheets.there are lots of ant around my cabin.fans make really loud cracking noise.tv only lets you watch a few Chanel’s , no Netflix YouTube or anything. Service, everything closes 45 minutes early like the games room and pool. Wifi is pretty bad when the entire place is using it. Location,I absolutely love the location, it is like a 5 minute walk from the far end of the park,if you were on the other end it would be like a 30 second walk..there are shops within a 10 minute walk not even.there are wonderfull food places around here.
Lovely caravan park, peaceful location with easy beach access
Right on the beach, great facilities and easy walk into the town.
Very large campsite. Plenty to do and see, pool is lovely - easy access to beach and wildlife everywhere
9:30pm at night security shone a light in our car asking for paperwork, pretty outrageous, they wouldn’t go until I showed them our receipt.

The more expensive caravan sites around the river do not have sullage and water is at the front of the site so make sure you have a very long hose. Toilet block only had one working/filled handwash dispenser and shower did not have soap holders. Park map shows gates that are locked and blocked off to access river/beach.
Excellent caravan park on the beach with a great pool and lovely grounds

Booked power site
Arrived on site staff friendly and organised
Site was great no issues
Facilities all good
Toilets showers bit old but clean and plenty of hot water.
And cleaned few times a day.
Thanks for a great stay
Nice place,  lotsa stuff for the kids, even brought the pooch. Loved it 👍 They have even got a toddler room, fantastic
Great caravan park, lots of things to do for the kids in the park, right on the beach camping

2nd stay. So close to beach and town. Will stay longer next time off peak as $$$
Great ammenities

We've stayed here a couple of times now, and really like it. We had a two bedroom cabin, it was small but had everything we needed, and was clean and in good condition - although the shower is a little on the small side! We didn't use a lot of the facilities, but the pool was lovely. My favourite part is the easy access to the beach, really convenient.

Fantastic location! Hardly used the car at all, it was so nice being able to walk to the (STUNNING!) beach, river, and the local shops - including a very handy IGA & lots of take away food options.

My son and I stayed in a cabin. It was perfect. Clean. Lovely. Safe. And my son LOVED the pool and jumping pillow. All the kids rode their bikes around, it is a huge site but all very secure and family friendly. Kangaroos and cockatoos were a highlight. The staff were lovely. The onsite kiosk (and coffee!) was lovely.

We had an amazing time and will absolutely be back!

Over all the family caravan park is really nice great place to be at heaps to do lots of activities on site and off site to. The kids had a ball there. Really clean facilities, main issues is the kids areas closes to early the jumping pillow the pool closed way to early. The games room not worth the money at all no real games to play all the screens are very hard to see with a max of 6 games and two of them is a candy drop game with very old candy in it. The shared bbq areas really nice and well cleaned. A powered camping site for $149 a night seems a bit to high definitely a large camping area you get . Would definitely stay again, easy check in and check out system.

This place is amazing!!!!!!!!
I cannot wait to come back

Been located near the gate which is good. The cottage itself though gave us a dirty feeling. It has a weird smell inside which we could not tell what it is. Giving we paid $550 per night should I expect a nice cottage atleast. The swimming pool is so dirty and so unhygienic. The ducks are in the pool area at night. That explains why theres a lot of poo everywhere especially on the grass area.

This site is big with variety of activities for adults and kids. From swimming in the nearby beach, to playground in the site. The amentities are well-kept for your usage too. Easy access to site even after office hours.

Camped with our camper trailer next to the kids play area and pool. Had wallabies grazing nearby. Great place for kids. Good little beach. Close to the town centre. Very friendly staff. Can't fault this place. Will be back.

Didn’t have a great experience here. To start with they stick all the people with dogs down the sandy, bushy, muddy back section of the park like we are lepers. So far from all the kids play areas. Even mid week when the park is near on empty, So we got 7 or 8 vans jammed in this little section while all the grass area is empty. Then we come back to go to the pool 45mins before the sign says it closes and it’s already locked and no one at reception to talk too - so that was another disappointment. Maybe look at your polices and practices from a guest experience point of view and review them.

One star because you don’t have a smoke free policy. It’s 2024. Reply confirming the implementation of a smoke free policy and this review can be deleted or replaced with the 4 or 5 stars you otherwise deserve.

What a great surprise this place was! I booked last minute for my three year old and me to go camping for a few nights... And it was a distance short enough from Melbourne that made it super easy!
Fantastic facilities (camp kitchens, own bathrooms, playground, grass oval, swimming pool and balloon trampoline)
Close to the beach and shops, lots of wildlife wandering the campground (kangaroos, ducks, cockatoos, galahs, and you might be lucky enough to see (or hear) a koala).
A well set up ground with lots of different areas: Caravans, cabins, and multiple areas for tents... Grass or under trees, out in the open, nestled with other offerings. Great options!
Ground was hard for the tent pegs, but not impossible with a good hammer.
Only thing confusing was the map and our site location, but it seems these are in the process of being redone... So that should help.
Really great facility for kids!

This is a park in an excellent location. The park amenities are average and we had no hot water in female showers. The amenities need a refresh. The prices have skyrocketed, we paid $93 a night for a powered site off peak!  The kids activities are good. However value for $$ is not there now.

Lovely location, we were given a lovely shady spot fifty metres from the beach. Plenty of bbq cooking options but unfortunately management refused to provide adequate cleaning equipment on account of theft. As we’d planned to cook on site and hadn’t brought portable camping equipment, we weren’t left with many options as barbecues are constantly filthy as no one is able to clean them after or before use. I’d suggest chaining a scraper to the bbqs or finding an alternative cleaning option.
Great location, have got beach access, river on the back, pool, kitchen, kangaroos, close by iga and other stores and cafés.
Wonderful place and amazing facilities!

Haben im Zelt geschlafen.
Boden sehr hart somit auch schwer um Heringe in den Boden zu bekommen.
Eine Vielfalt an Tieren nachts um einen herum!
Ein Paradies für Surfer und Schulklassen!

I love this place everything is fantastic BUT, prices have gone thru the roof and 4 night minimum stays over long weekends,
very disappointed.

We went to the Anglesey family caravan park with our family and other groups of families for a long weekend|The weather wasn’t great, but still lots to do for the kids playground and games room great ideas |Caravan sites nice and big and green |Lots of facilities in the park great space, well-maintained, and nice and clean |Well, done looking forward to coming back
This is an exceptional place to be for the family. Beach, river and shops all within walking distance.
Camp site available for $35 per night. It is straight infront of the beach on higher ground so the view is 👌. Lovely location and all the site seeing locations (12 apostles etc) are within 1hr drive.
Everything is great!
Great cabin for its age. Very quiet park at night
Love the area, location is central. We had pleasant time staying here.
Great park, clean, down the back was close to beach but still protected from wind

Wanted a late check out as my wife and child was doing the 13km run in the rain so wanted a shower at just after 11am (checkout 10am) and was charged another $50 on top of the $280 I'd already payed. Booked elsewhere for next year's race,I only get stung once.
Good location
Outrageous mid week price of $69 for a site in dirt. Old daggy amenities. Miles from anywhere
Everyone in my family was very happy for first time experience to stay in the holiday park. Lots of faclities and acitivities to enjoy there.
Everything about this place is perfect specially the prices, shishas and the sitting area, don't miss out it's one of the best places I've ever been 👌

Great stay, everything you need. Lots for the kids to do at park. Lots for the family to do in Anglesea. Short walk to the beach or river. Beds were comfy & thankfully cabins warm as the nights got chilly but days were lovely.

Stunning location, lake and beach near by, a number of different sized sites, shops about 10 minute walk. Plenty of facilities around and pool. Prices are steep now especially long weekends, we have decided to camp at free sites now due to being quoted over $100 a night for non powered site on Australia Day long weekend which was disappointing and money hungry.
Had a powered site about 50m from the beach and river. Great spot

Unfortunately one of the worst caravan parks we stayed at!
We booked a cottage and paid almost $300/night. The WiFi is not even enough to check mails and the staff that we talked to was very unfriendly and rude.
There were dirty towels in our bathroom when we arrived and the fan on the ceiling looked like it was about to fall off once we turned it on.
There’s much better price/value options in the area if you decide to stay in Anglesea!
We will not come back.
great location, excellent facilities!
Such a beautiful spot and the whole place is so clean and tidy!
이곳은 무조건 들러야 한다.  캥거루 바다 모두 너무좋고 잘 정리되어있다

Location was absolutely faultless. But as a camper that pays for amenities the toilets and shower were probably the worst I've ever experienced considering I was in a caravan park. I honestly believe that they were not cleaned over the entire long weekend as there board stayed blank with time clean times recorded the entire time! I payed well 115 per night for a powered site which is quite high and to have such poor cleaning to amenities is a real shame.  I gave it 3 stars because it was beach front other that that there was absolutely nothing going for this park yes it has a pool but not big enough to cater for the park size.

Great location however more expensive then most parks hence only a 3 night stay with our caravan. Only one dump site in the whole park. More slabs will make it more appealing.
Seams to be oriented to short term campers or permanents then caravaners.
All in all a positive experience.
Always enjoy our stay here.
Had a lovely walk on the beach. Facilities are lovely and clean.
My partner and I had a great experience camping here. Safe, quiet and good facilities. Great location.

Think that this is one of those gems on our coastline and only about an hour and a half from the city direct. Caped there for our very first family camping trip with 2 little girls and just love the sounds of the waves next to our camp site just over the hedge, the facilities are great, people are all warm and welcoming, perfect family spot really.
Large pitch, clean facilities, friendly staff
Simply wonderful. I had a great stay. Comfy bed and bathroom, nice outdoor table. Good environment. Nice distance to the beach, forest, supermarket. Quiet and clean.

For some reason on the morning I went there were way too many crickets, it's not even funny. Saw 10 in the Shower Block and one more for good measure in the camp kitchen, not to mention one more for good luck in another amenity block. You couldn't just hear them, you could see them.

This place was amazing, peaceful, great amenities that are cleaned daily.  Friendly welcoming staff from reception to cleaners.  Big sites for caravans, trailer tents, swags or just sleeping in the car.  The cabins looked great but didn't see inside them.  Has a pool, kids play areas, tv/games room, the outdoor kitchen is the best I have seen so far, the indoor kitchen was impressive too.  Access to the beach straight from the camp and just across the road from the main strip of shops in Anglesea
Clean and very friendly site. Close to beach and dog friendly.

We came here for one night and pre-booked an area close to the sea. When we arrived I asked if there was a choice of site and was told that it was nearly full and so no. The reality was very different and there were actually lots of sites to choose from. This is not the service that other campsites give and I feel is just laziness on the part of the service staff.|We Enjoyed the location (close to the paths) and the facilities which were clean and hot water was plentiful. We paid $57 for a powered site which is reasonable value for money, pity about the service!
Way overpriced in the Summer Holiday period. Paying more than 5 star prices for about 2 star quality

Perfectly located right in the centre of town with walking distance to the beach, shops and river.  This is a fantastic caravan park, with extremely clean facilities and a newly renovated massive camp kitchen and lovely pool.  Have already re-booked for next year!

Wir hatten hier 2 wundervolle Tage mit unserem Camper. Die Lage ist grandios, die sanitären Anlagen waren ok. Wirklich cool, dass dort so viele Kangaroos waren. Das Personal war sehr freundlich. Der Preis war ein wenig höher als auf anderen Plätzen.

We absolutely LOVE this park! Right on the river and the beach, great showers and toilet blocks, lots of different camp sites, big oval, jumping pillow, pool and spa, several great playgrounds and it never feels busy! Once you get off the highway and into the park it’s just peaceful and relaxing! We come every year!
Great location and nice campsites next to the ocean and beach. Really secure location with lots of staff around. Start of the ocean road.
Lovely caravan park right by the beach. Staff are friendly and an easy walk into town

Good location and reasonable facilities. Small sites that are close together. Very expensive for a powered site outside school holidays. $75 per night for 2 people in a caravan. Toilets and showers well cleaned. Showers might have been ok if sufficient water had come out!

This is a great place if you’re looking for the tent experience without the rough camping aspect.

Probably my new favourite spot for a family trip. I booked the bush camp sites, it’s perfectly located within the grounds. Nice shady space among the trees, a gas bbq and toilet block located within a few metres of the sites, and super close to the beach entrance.

Bathrooms and toilets are well maintained, other amenities are fantastic too, laundry and camp kitchen etc. Some playgrounds are clearly new and some probably need a refresh in a little while but still good.

Lots of wildlife to see. Good location, well planned campsite. Don’t know about the cabins etc but the campsites are great.
For the price, very disappointing site and uncourteous staff. A shame because beautiful area. Wouldn’t recommend.

Really bad experience ! Arrived late to check in after hours to find the sites that we booked were nothing like pictured and had no coverage wind wise for the people camping in tents. They also never communicated to us at the time of booking that we would only be allowed x2 cars per site. Would highly recommend investing your money else where the staff member we dealt with was really rude from the get go !

We stayed in our van at one of the prime powered sites, access to the beach is amazing, camp kitchens are very clean and large.
We have a 8.1M van and found it very easy to navigate around the park.
Will be back for sure.

I phoned and booked a caravan site for 4 nights, I paid for one night using my credit card, not once did someone tell me that they will be taking the rest of my money the morning before I got there. The only notice I got was when they did it!! If I had known this is what they do, I wouldn't have come! When we got here after 10hrs of driving, we were told we can have a look at a few sites and they had written the sites name, we found the one we liked and set up, we then rang them to let them know and they said that's fine. Then 10mins later they called to say sorry that site is booked by someone, we went over to the office to explain we had set up, but they wouldn't budge. We had to pack up again and move to a different site, that had so many holes very unlevel and the worst part of it was a family of 4 set up next to us and the kids were crying,coughing etc, they must have woken up at 5am, then waking us up! This place isn't kept very well. We won't be coming back and won't be staying for all the days we booked for!

Lovely place to stay well maintained and cared for and wonderful reception from the staff
Wonderful atmosphere
Great location lovely staff

We really enjoyed our weekend here, even though the weather turned crazy with 70-90km/h winds.
Facilities are clean. Customer service efficient. Were able to accomodate 5 families all next to each other. So much to do for the kids. Kangaroos sitting around. Baby ducklings and parents roaming. Campsites generous size and don’t feel crammed, we hired a caravan last minute and it fit easily. Pricing is very fair.
And during the crazy windstorm the families we were with staying in tents had their tents collapse and the management was able to accomodate them with a cabin nearby, which just about nearly saved 4 adults and 6 kids night if not life.
Would love to come back here in better weather

Had the most amazing 4 days with my partner and our dog.
Close to an amazing beach ⛱️
Perfect camping area
Clean toilets and showers
Large camp kitchen (be mindful about others with food unfortunately we had someone pinch some of ours) but it didn't ruin our trip and this wasn't the owners of the camp grounds fault. Just there is some people out there who don't play nice.

We are going to book our next trip for a few weeks away that's how keen we are to get back.

We enjoyed our stay here for a power campsite. Appropriately priced and it was great to see the kangaroos bouncing around right outside! It gets a bit dark at night so make sure you bring a flashlight if you head to get a meal

Awesome location with direct and easy access to the beach. The beach is accessible after dark too for late night moonlight walks. Plenty of activities in the park for kids of all ages. Multiple camp kitchens and toilet blocks that are well maintained for campers.
We stayed for 6 nights. Great place to stay with lots of things to do for the kids. Awesome beach and river.

I was here for a few days, the rooms were a bit cramped and the walls were thin
it was acceptable but could be better in my opinion
Eat place in winter. Have it all to yourself including the beach.

I am unable to give a different review on this property because I was refused a booking as I have two dogs and there's only one of me. Even though the park advertises itself as dog friendly, it will not let a solo person stay with two dogs. Reason being the dog has to be under control at all times when you use the amenities. When I use the amenities, I lock my dogs in my caravan. So this does not make any sense to me because if I had been one person with one dog I would have been able to stay in the caravan park Buyer Beware, I have checked all the rules on their website and in the related links and cannot find anything which states this rule they have. I think this is very discriminatory.  I never leave my dogs outside the van when I am travelling when I use the amenities I even offered to use my own shower in the van. That way I don't have to go to the amenities but still no go Have never come across this ridiculous rule before.
On reading more reviews on this property relating to dogs, it seems that you're even restricted as to where you can walk your dog in the park. So guess I am lucky they wouldn't accept my booking because it would have been a very unpleasant stay with my dogs

Everything was fantastic: late arrival check-in was easy and convenient, facilities were clean and very good, and we really appreciated having the heating on at our arrival. It is clear that the team takes care about the small details.
Enjoyed my time there

Great family cabin's.
Heaps of room to move and very comfortable too.
Beds were very comfortable and roomy.
Spa was nice and relaxing.
Very quite park are great natural feel to the whole park.
Play areas are fantastic and family friendly.
The birds are very friendly and will get very close to you.
We stayed with 4 kids aged 10 weeks to 18 years old and was very easy to function like we would at home.
Perfect little weekend escape

Saw lots of kangaroos in the morning.

It is clean and warm. Water pressure is strong. Comes handy with dishwasher, oven and cooker. Great family stay.

Camped here over a long weekend. Location is second to none, so close to the beach, food options in town, and the walking trail! The amenities are clean, and plenty of them. The pool was not working, and we were offered a partial refund, which was genourous. Can't wait to stay again.
